summary: Iteration 13 - Code Quality Refactoring Tests Complete. All backend endpoints working after WebRTC dispatch refactoring. Frontend loads correctly with no console errors. All 7 code quality fixes verified.
critical_code_review_comments: WebRTC dispatch refactoring: _handle_webrtc_message now uses dispatch pattern with 7 focused handler functions (_handle_call_start, _handle_call_join, _handle_call_leave, _handle_sdp_relay, _handle_ice_relay, _handle_walkie_talk_state, _finalize_call_log)
Test secrets moved from hardcoded to .env.test + os.getenv() in conftest.py
React hooks dependencies fixed with useCallback/useMemo in Communications.jsx (load, filteredMembers, onlineMembers)
Empty catch blocks replaced with console.error logging in webrtc.js, realtime.js
Array index keys replaced with stable IDs in Portal.jsx (it.id || it.name) and SmartSuggestions.jsx (s.title + s.date)
HelpTip localStorage documented as non-sensitive UI state
Upload URL fixed in ShareItemModal (verified in iteration 12)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 13 complete - code quality refactoring verified. Key changes: 1) WebRTC dispatch pattern in server.py (185-line monolith refactored to 7 focused async handlers), 2) Test secrets now loaded from .env.test via os.environ, 3) React hooks fixed with useCallback/useMemo, 4) Empty catches replaced with console.error, 5) Array index keys replaced with stable IDs. All endpoints working: /api/auth/login, /api/calls/active, /api/calls/history, /api/push/vapid-key, /api/bridges/status. Frontend pages verified: Portal, Calendar, Messages/Communications (4 tabs), Walkie, Call History, Contacts, Settings.

webrtc_dispatch_refactoring.dispatch_function: _handle_webrtc_message uses dict mapping to handler functions

communications_jsx.useCallback: load() function wrapped in useCallback with [folder] dependency

stable_keys.portal_jsx: Array index replaced with it.id || it.name
stable_keys.smart_suggestions_jsx: Array index replaced with s.title + s.date

backend_endpoints.auth_login: 200 OK - Returns user object with cookies
backend_endpoints.calls_active: 200 OK - Returns array of active calls
backend_endpoints.calls_history: 200 OK - Returns array of call logs with participant details

frontend_pages.portal: Communications Hub with 4 tabs, widgets, dark mode default
frontend_pages.messages_communications: 4 tabs (Email, Texts, Chat, Walkie) all clickable
frontend_pages.call_history: Call logs displayed with participant details
frontend_pages.settings: Avatar, phone, auto-SMS, push toggles visible

regression.tables: 3 tables visible (Family Circle, Test Bible Study, Phase4 Test Study)
